meta.name: KiciaHook Support Knowledge Base
notes: Most issues are caused by executing in the main lobby, outdated Roblox, or unsupported executors.
Always check supported executors first when troubleshooting.
Do not invent fixes that are not in this knowledge base.
meta.fallback_reply: I couldn't confidently find a solution for that. Please ping a staff member for help.

not_recommended.name: Cosmic
not_recommended.reply: Cosmic is experimental and may work, but is not officially supported.

not_recommended.name: Delta
not_recommended.reply: Delta is experimental and may work, but is not officially supported. To fix not-loading or freezing: turn off **Auto Execute** in Delta settings, then follow the known issues guide: https://kiciahook.gitbook.io/docs/kiciahook-known-issues. Note: freezing after a few matches is a known Delta issue that Delta themselves need to fix.

not_recommended.name: Velocity
not_recommended.reply: Velocity does not work fully — projectiles crash. It is recommended to use a fully supported executor instead.

not_recommended.name: Ronix
not_recommended.reply: Ronix does not work fully — projectiles crash. It is recommended to use a fully supported executor instead.

not_recommended.name: Opiumware
not_recommended.reply: Opiumware has not been tested with KiciaHook. It could work, but we can't guarantee it. Use a fully supported executor for the best experience.

not_recommended.name: Hydrogen
not_recommended.reply: Hydrogen has not been tested with KiciaHook. It could work, but we can't guarantee it. Use a fully supported executor for the best experience.

not_recommended.name: MacSploit
not_recommended.reply: MacSploit has not been tested with KiciaHook. It could work, but we can't guarantee it. Use a fully supported executor for the best experience.

unsupported.reply: Xeno is unsupported and does not work with KiciaHook. Please switch to a supported executor.

issues.title: GUI Not Loading / Security Kick 1 / FPS Drops / Lag / Lobby Issue
issues.cause: Executing the script in the main lobby, using an unsupported executor, or using the wrong script.
issues.reply: KiciaHook currently does **not** work in the main lobby. If your game is freezing, lagging, the GUI isn't loading, or you're getting kicked, it is almost always one of these things:
steps: **Join a match or a private server first.** Do not execute in the main menu or lobby.
Make sure **Auto Execute** is turned off in your executor settings.
Check that you are using a supported executor: https://kiciahook.gitbook.io/docs/supported-executors
Make sure you copied the correct full script from the panel.
**Free script panel:** <https://discord.com/channels/1279483425002361003/1298767534736277595>
**Premium script panel:** <https://discord.com/channels/1279483425002361003/1484259191039332473>
**If none of the above work** → Go to your executor's workspace folder, delete the `kiciahook` folder, and execute again.

issues.title: How to Load a Config
issues.reply: Here is how to properly place and load your `.json` config file:
steps: Open your executor folder on your PC.
Navigate to **Workspace > KiciaHook > RivalsV2 > Configs**.
Place your `.json` config file inside that folder.
Launch Roblox and join a match.
Execute KiciaHook.
Go to **Settings > Configs** inside the GUI, and load your file.

issues.title: How to Create / Save a Config
match_phrases: how do i save my settings
issues.reply: You can easily create and save your own settings inside the script:
steps: Open **Settings** inside the KiciaHook GUI.
Create a new config.
Adjust your settings however you like.
Select the config you want to save.
Click **Save**.

issues.title: No HWID Found Error
issues.reply: This means you are using an incomplete or broken script. Here is how to fix it:
steps: Go to your Kicia panel.
Click **Redeem Script**.
Copy the ENTIRE script exactly as shown (make sure nothing gets cut off).
Paste and execute it in your executor.

issues.title: How to Reset HWID
issues.reply: We no longer manually reset HWIDs. Please wait out your cooldown.

issues.title: Roblox Version Mismatch / Executor Outdated
match_phrases: roblox updated and now it wont work
issues.reply: Roblox has updated, but your executor hasn't caught up yet. You have two options:
steps: Wait for your supported executor to release an update (usually takes up to 24 hours).
If you don't want to wait, you can manually downgrade your Roblox client using one of these links: https://weao.xyz | https://inject.today | https://voxlis.net/roblox/

issues.title: Difference Between Free and Premium
issues.reply: The main difference is **Orbit Aura**, which is exclusive to KiciaHook Premium. Premium offers stronger combat performance overall, but your results still depend heavily on your config settings.

issues.title: Lost a Fight While Using Premium
issues.reply: This is almost always a config issue, not a premium issue. A free user with a perfect config can easily beat a premium user with a bad config.
steps: Open the KiciaHook GUI.
Go to **Settings > Configs**.
Adjust your settings for combat or load an optimized combat config.

issues.title: Banned / Detected
match_phrases: i got banned with only kicia
issues.reply: KiciaHook is thoroughly tested to remain undetected. If you were banned, it was likely due to one of these reasons:
steps: **Manual ban** — you were obviously cheating in front of a game moderator.
**Executor detection** — you're using an unsupported or detected executor.
**Other scripts** — you ran other detected scripts alongside KiciaHook.

issues.title: Account Transfers / Discord Server Ban
issues.reply: This needs to be handled by staff. Please ping a staff member in the server.

issues.title: Security Kick 2 / AutoExec Conflict
issues.reply: Something in your executor's AutoExec folder is conflicting with KiciaHook. Here is how to fix it:
steps: Open your executor folder on your PC.
Find the **Auto Execute** or **AutoExec** folder.
Delete all files inside that folder.
Restart your executor.
Inject and try executing KiciaHook again.

issues.title: Reseller Did Not Provide a Key
issues.reply: If you bought from a reseller and haven't received your key:
steps: Contact the reseller directly and wait up to 48 hours for a response.
If they haven't replied after 48 hours, ping a staff member.
Make sure you have your proof of purchase ready.

issues.title: Features Not Visible on Your Screen
issues.reply: Some features (like Hide Under Floor or Orbit Aura) are client-side only. This means they look completely normal on your screen, but other players will see the effect. This is intentional and not a bug.

issues.title: Cannot Generate a New Key (Hit Key Limit)
issues.reply: Luarmor limits each account to a maximum of 5 keys. You cannot generate a new one. Here is what to do instead:
steps: Go to the Kicia panel.
Find one of your existing keys in the list.
Look to the right side of the key and click **Renew**.

issues.title: Where to Buy / Pricing / Robux Payment
issues.reply: For all pricing, payment methods (including Robux), and to purchase Premium, please check out the resellers channel here: <https://discord.com/channels/1279483425002361003/1464668736349798642>

issues.title: GUI Layout Guide
issues.reply:
Here is where everything is located in the KiciaHook GUI:

• **Combat:** Legitbot, Silent Aim, Triggerbot, Rage (Contains Orbit Aura & Anti Aim)
• **Visuals:** ESP, Overrides, World, Players
• **Misc:** Movement, Fly, Walkspeed, Slideboost, Auto Queue, Device Spoofer, Hitsounds, Weapons (Unlock All, No Spread, Anti Katata), Auto Loadout
• **Settings:** Keybinds, Auto Run Script, Configs

issues.title: No Spread Causing Long Melee
issues.reply: If you are getting a long melee animation when trying to quick melee, you need to turn off **No Spread**. This is a known side effect.
steps: Open the KiciaHook GUI.
Navigate to **Misc > Weapons**.
Turn off **No Spread**.

issues.title: Anti Katata Not Working
issues.reply: Anti Katata is heavily ping-dependent. If you have high ping, it may not work reliably. This is a game limitation, not a bug.

issues.title: Out of Bounds is Bugged
issues.reply: Out of Bounds is currently bugged and may not work correctly. This is a known issue that we are aware of.

issues.title: Magic Bullet Patched
issues.reply: Magic Bullet has been patched by the game developers and is no longer available in KiciaHook.

issues.title: Where to Find the Workspace Folder
match_phrases: where is the yub x folder
issues.reply: If you need to find your executor's workspace folder (usually to place a config), open it directly using the Windows Run menu:
steps: Press **Windows Key + R** on your keyboard (or search 'Run' in the Windows search bar).
For **Synapse Z**: Type `%localappdata%\synapse z` and press Enter.
For **Yub X**: Type `%localappdata%\yubx` and press Enter.
For **Volt / Isaeva / Potassium**: Check the executor's own menu for a 'Workspace' or 'Open Folder' button.
Once the folder opens, look for the **workspace** folder inside.

issues.title: Whitelist / Key Not Working
issues.reply: To activate your key and get whitelisted, you need to redeem it in the panel.
steps: Go to the **free or premium panel** channel in this Discord server.
Find the Kicia Panel message.
Click **Redeem Key** and enter your key.

issues.title: Script Expired / Key Expired
issues.reply: Free keys expire every 24 hours and need to be renewed. Premium keys run on a subscription and expire at the end of the billing period.
steps: For a **free key**: go to the free panel → find your key → click **Renew**.

For a **premium key**: go to the premium panel → find your key → check the expiry date. If it expired, purchase another from a reseller: <https://discord.com/channels/1279483425002361003/1464668736349798642>

issues.title: Script Panel Link / Where to Get Script
issues.reply: Script panels are located here:
steps: **Free script panel:** <https://discord.com/channels/1279483425002361003/1298767534736277595>
**Premium script panel:** <https://discord.com/channels/1279483425002361003/1484259191039332473>
Click **Redeem Script** in the panel to copy the script.

issues.title: Silent Aim, Rage, and Projectile TP Not Working
issues.reply: Features such as silent aim, rage, and projectile TP currently do not work because the Rivals anticheat updated and patched some projectile TP functions.
steps: Please wait for Kicia to fully update rage and other features.

issues.title: KiciaHook Website / Official Site
issues.reply: KiciaHook does not currently have an official website. For purchasing, pricing, and payment options (including Robux), please check the resellers channel: <https://discord.com/channels/1279483425002361003/1464668736349798642>

issues.title: How to delete KiciaHook from Workspace
match_phrases: how to delete kiciahook from workspace
how to remove kiciahook from workspace
how to uninstall kiciahook from workspace
issues.reply: If you need to find your executor's workspace folder to delete Kiciahook, follow these steps:
steps: Press **Win + R** to open the Run dialog.
Type **%appdata%** and press Enter.
Navigate to your **executor folder**.
Click **workspace** and delete the **Kiciahook** folder.

issues.title: How to get a freemium key for Kiciahook
match_phrases: how do i obtain a key
how do i get a key
how do i get a freemium key
how do i get a kiciahook key
issues.reply: To obtain a freemium key for Kiciahook, you can follow these steps:
steps: click on one of the links: **Lootlabs** https://ads.luarmor.net/get_key?for=Kicia_V2__Lootlabs-SMXIkbgLHBUc or **adslift** https://ads.luarmor.net/get_key?for=Kicia_V2__Linkvertise-ovgXmLTYGpby
how to complete the key system
1. complete the captcha
2. close the pop-up
3. complete the task (download an app, visit a website, etc.)
4. click on **__get a new key__** after completing the tasks

bot_rules.executor_warning_reply: Most issues are caused by executing in the main lobby or by using an unsupported executor. Please make sure you are using a supported executor and that you joined a match before executing.
bot_rules.unsupported_executor_reply: That executor is unsupported. Using unsupported executors can cause detection, instability, script errors, or features not working correctly. Please switch to a supported executor.
bot_rules.support_only_reply: This issue needs to be handled by staff. Please ping a staff member.
bot_rules.unknown_reply: This isn't a known issue in our documentation. Please ping a staff member for further assistance.
